title: What is a Folder?
drDigitalIntro: A folder is like a filing cabinet drawer. Just like you organize papers into different drawers so you can find them later, you organize files into folders. A folder is an empty container until you put files inside it. You can have folders inside folders — like having dividers inside a drawer.
drDigitalSuccess: You understand folders! They're how we keep files organized.
drDigitalHint: Think of your desktop like a real desk — folders are like the drawers you keep things in.
